scripts.reload: npm run build && pm2 reload notes
scripts.android:sync: [ -d android ] || npx cap add android; npx cap sync android
scripts.android:build: npm run android:sync && mkdir -p resources && cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease && $ANDROID_HOME/build-tools/35.0.0/apksigner sign --ks $MCNOTES_KEYSTORE_PATH --ks-key-alias $MCNOTES_KEY_ALIAS --ks-pass env:MCNOTES_KEYSTORE_PASS --key-pass env:MCNOTES_KEY_PASS --out ../resources/McNotes.apk app/build/outputs/apk/release/app-release-unsigned.apk && echo 'APK ready at resources/McNotes.apk'
